case_title: STEVEN D LEE VS. OMAN BEVERLY SMYTH

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,829.58 FILED BY LEE, STEVEN D AS TO DEFENDANT SMYTH, OMAN BEVERLY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-10-2024 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
REMARK: CONTINUE ORDER MAILED TO PLAINTIFF, RETURNED, FORWARD TIME EXPIRED.
REMARK:RETURN MAIL BY POST OFFICE NOV-25-2024 ORDER OF DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION MAIL TO DEFENDANT(ENVOLOPE MARKED:RETURN TO SENDER NO SUCH NUMBER UNABLE TO FORWARD)
REMARK: EXHIBITS DESTROYED PURSUANT TO ORDER FILED ON 8/4/2025. (SEE MANAGER FOR ORDER.)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE: $0 SERVED SEP-10-2024, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SMYTH, OMAN BEVERLY

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF STEVEN D. LEE IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT OMAN BEVERLY SMITH IS NOT PRESENT. JUDGE: JOSEPH HURLEY; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-10-2024 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO NOV-14-2024 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF STEVEN D. LEE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT OMAN BEVERLY SMYTH IS NOT PRESENT. THE COURT RECEIVED A CHECK FROM THE DEFENDANT PAYABLE TO THE PLAINTIFF FOR THE AMOUNT OF THE CLAIM IN EURO'S. PER MANAGMENT, THE COURT CANNOT BE A MIDDLE MAN FOR SETTLEMENT PAYMENTS. THE PLAINTIFF IS DIRECTED TO CONTACT THE DEFENDANT TO HAVE THEM CUT HIM A CHECK DIRECTLY TO HIM FOR THE AMOUNT OF THE CLAIM. IF NO APPEARANCES AT THE NEXT HEARING, THIS MATTER WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: SYLVIA HUSING; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
